name: Tuna Cheese Salad
recipeIngredient: -a few strips of green pepper, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the tuna and flake it into small pieces with a fork.
2. Cut the cheese into 1-inch cubes.
3. In a bowl, combine the tuna, cheese, gherkins, celery, and Skim Milk Mayonnaise (or Colby cheese and Light Mayonnaise). Mix well.
4. Cover the bowl and chill for at least 1 hour or longer to allow flavors to meld.
5. Serve on crisp lettuce leaves, garnished with thin strips of green pepper.
- When red and yellow peppers are available, use them all for color variety.
6. Adjust sodium by substituting low-sodium cheese if desired. Omit salt from the Skim Milk Mayonnaise.
Food Exchanges: 1 Medium-Fat Meat Exchange + 1 Vegetable Exchange
Calories: 251
Protein: 23g
Fat: 15g
Sodium: 552mg
